verification_notes: Official county zoning, planning, GIS, building safety, and Municode ordinance sources are identified. Keep non-public until district mapping and golden QA pass.

sources.title: Roanoke County Zoning Office
sources.excerpt: Roanoke County Planning and Zoning administers the zoning ordinance and land use codes, responds to land use concerns, and provides zoning-related public guidance for properties in the county.

sources.title: Roanoke County Zoning Ordinance
sources.excerpt: The Roanoke County Code identifies the county zoning ordinance and official zoning map as the framework for zoning districts, map amendments, special use permits, variances, and other zoning reviews.

sources.title: Roanoke County Planning Office
sources.excerpt: Roanoke County Planning provides land use and development guidance and works with zoning, development review, and county planning processes.

sources.title: Roanoke County GIS Services and Zoning Details
sources.excerpt: Roanoke County GIS applications provide web-based map access for county and Town of Vinton users, including property information and zoning details through GIS applications.

sources.title: Roanoke County Building Safety and USBC Enforcement
sources.excerpt: Roanoke County Building Safety enforces the Virginia Uniform Statewide Building Code and requires permits before construction, reconstruction, alteration, repair, conversion, or demolition of regulated buildings or structures.
